method: adaptive Grover minimum search with max-affine value-register comparator oracle

floating_comparator_oracle.comparison: mark feasible x when max-affine prediction <= prediction threshold

fixed_point_register_oracle.comparison: mark feasible x when prediction_register <= tau_register

oracle_decomposition.max_register: reversible comparator tree computes max_r L_r(x)
oracle_decomposition.threshold_update: load incumbent-dependent threshold tau before each adaptive search round
oracle_decomposition.threshold_comparator: mark if feasible(x) and max-affine value <= tau_register
oracle_decomposition.bbht_inner_loop: randomize Grover iterations because target count is unknown
oracle_decomposition.classical_verification: evaluate measured commitment using exact ED/cache before incumbent update
oracle_decomposition.uncompute: reverse max, affine pieces, features, and feasibility after phase marking
